items.name: Repeat incident and capacity escalation review
items.description: Analyze repeating regional runtime, capacity, backup, and observability escalations that should become product or automation work.
questions: Which incident classes repeat by region?
Which capacity limits should be forecast earlier?
Which backup or failover checks are missing?
items.decisionToInform: Prioritize roadmap scope, operating guardrails, and product-brick ownership for the related objective.

items.name: Cost and posture drift root causes
items.description: Review recurring cost anomalies and security posture findings to identify missing defaults, training, or automation.
questions: Which misconfigurations are caused by unclear defaults?
Which exceptions should become policy templates?
items.decisionToInform: Prioritize roadmap scope, operating guardrails, and product-brick ownership for the related objective.
